Protocols & Placement Guidelin... How to Use FlexBeam to Sleep Better
How to Use FlexBeam to Sleep Better If you haven’t already, read FlexBeam Applications and Usage and How to Use Your FlexBeam before proceeding. FlexBeam may help you improve your sleeping pattern and your sleep quality. Use FlexBeam once daily before sleep for five consecutive days,
followed by a two-day break. Repeat for three weeks. After this period, you may continue with the same pattern or use FlexBeam every other day until you are satisfied with the results. The
cumulative benefits of regular use contribute significantly to the effectiveness of this protocol. The best time to use this protocol is before sleep. However, if you feel more energized instead of relaxed after using FlexBeam, consider
shifting your session to the morning. Alternate placements as in Protocol A and Protocol B daily. Protocol A Hi, need help? Hi, need help? Buy now
